factor_value: PGE2, lubricin/TP and gelsolin/TP were predictive of disease status, while TP was not.
number_of_fractions: the eight eluted fractions were pooled into four fractions
number_of_biological_replicates: Fifty‐eight OA and 25 healthy carpal joints were included in the full cohort
